name: Baizhu
description:
💘 | Dangerous Dose Of Desire

› What's a love-struck doctor to do when forced to face his feelings with the "help" from his snake?

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

The sweet, heady aroma of aphrodisiac hit Baizhu like a punch to the senses, making his heart race faster than it should.

The flush would not leave his face, nor the warmth in his veins. He could feel his pulse thudding in his neck, but he knew it wasn't just the aphrodisiac.

No, that warmth was already there, long before today.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

I like the idea of Changsheng being a matchmaker a little too much

I'm also sick so I think posting Baizhu rn is perfect
